---
title: "Calibration Report"
output: pdf_document
params:
  slope: NA
  intercept: NA
  r_squared: NA
  lod: NA
  loq: NA
  p_slope: NA
  p_intercept: NA
---

This report summarizes the results of a linear regression calibration model, 

$$
\hat{y} = m \hat{x} + b
$$


### Model Coefficients

- **Slope**: `r params$slope`
- **Intercept**: `r params$intercept`
- **R-squared**: `r params$r_squared`


### Detection Limits

- **Limit of Detection (LOD)**: `r params$lod`
- **Limit of Quantification (LOQ)**: `r params$loq`


### Statistical Significance

- **p value (Slope)**: `r params$p_slope`
- **p value (Intercept)**: `r params$p_intercept`



![Linear regression curve](regression_plot.png){width=100%, height=100%}



## Residuals



![Residuals of the linear regression model. Shown is the percentage deviation of the measured signals from the predicted signal. The prediction was calculated based on the regression model.](residuals_plot.png){width=100%, height=100%}
